raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I rented a vehicle from the merchant ( XXXX ) for a total disputed amount of {$280.00}. The vehicle was unsafe and defective from the moment of pickup, immediately displaying all 4 tire-pressure warnings. 

I attempted to return the car to the XXXX branch approximately five minutes after pickup, I had not drove out yet. But the store was already closed. With no immediate alternative, I paid {$2.00} out-of-pocket to inflate the tires and realized that one tire had no cap, but the warning reappeared within six hours. On XX/XX/year>, the front tire rapidly deflated, confirming a pre-existing defect and rendering the car undriveable. The roadside technician confirmed the car had no spare tire, leaving me stranded for four hours. My entire rental period was lost.

Despite providing an unsafe, defective vehicle, the merchant billed both the rental fee ( {$130.00} ) and an unwarranted tow charge ( {$150.00} ). This action constitutes a breach of the Texas Implied Warranty of Merchantability ( Texas Bus. & Com. Code 2.314 & 2A.212 ) and violates XXXX XXXX own Section 9 Mechanical Breakdown policy. 

I filed a dispute with the card issuer ( American Express ) under reference numbers XXXX and XXXX. The card issuer 's dispute process failed due to the following sequence : Initial Favorable Ruling : On XX/XX/XXXX, an Amex agent told me that my case was initially closed in my favor because the merchant 's evidence " did not make sense ''. 

Subsequent Reversal : Approximately 10 days later, the case was settled in the merchant 's favor ( a charge-back reversal notice was sent ). 

Misleading Agent Advice : On XX/XX/XXXX, a different Amex agent incorrectly advised me that the official email regarding the charge-back reversal ( " Important message for you from American Express '' ) was " likely a phishing/scam email ''. I relied on this advice, which delayed my recognition of the official dispute reversal notice. 

The dispute has since been reopened. I am filing this formal complaint to ensure Amex conducts a thorough and accurate review based on the merchant 's legal liability, as my prior attempts to resolve this issue have been complicated by Amex 's internal errors. I demand Amex reverse the entire charge of {$280.00}
